languages.text: "Клянусь, я сделал все, что мог. Сажать машину в другое место — все равно что выброситься в открытое в море! До центрального бура придется идти пешком..."

traits.locale_text: там половина затоплена, я сел где смог, дальше ваще дичь

languages.text: "I swear I did everything I could. Landing the thing anywhere else would've been the same as plunging into the open sea! You will have to reach the central drill on foot...
languages.original_text: "Клянусь, я сделал все, что мог. Сажать машину в другое место — все равно что выброситься в открытое в море! До центрального бура придется идти пешком..."

traits.locale_text: "I swear I did everything I could. Landing the thing anywhere else would've been the same as plunging into the open sea! You will have to reach the central drill on foot...
"I swear I did everything I could. Landing the thing anywhere else would've been the same as plunging into the open sea! You will have to reach the central drill on foot...
"I swear I did everything I could. Landing the thing anywhere else would've been the same as plunging into the open sea! You will have to reach the central drill on foot...

languages.text: 「できる限りのことはやった。この機体をどこかに着陸させても、海に落ちたのと変わらない。中央のドリルまで、歩いて行くしかない」
languages.original_text: "I swear I did everything I could. Landing the thing anywhere else would've been the same as plunging into the open sea! You will have to reach the central drill on foot...

traits.locale_text: 「できる限りのことはやった。この機体をどこかに着陸させても、海に落ちたのと変わらない。中央のドリルまで、歩いて行くしかない。

languages.text: «Juro que he hecho todo lo posible. ¡Aterrizar en cualquier otro lugar habría sido como zambullirnos en mar abierto! Tendrá que llegar al taladro central a pie...».
languages.original_text: "I swear I did everything I could. Landing the thing anywhere else would've been the same as plunging into the open sea! You will have to reach the central drill on foot...

traits.locale_text: «Juro que he hecho todo lo posible. ¡Aterrizar en cualquier otro lugar habría sido como zambullirnos en mar abierto! Tendrá que llegar al taladro central a pie...».

languages.text: “我发誓已经尽了全力。在其他任何地方降落都无异于一头扎进大海！您接下来只能步行前往中央钻机了……”
languages.original_text: "I swear I did everything I could. Landing the thing anywhere else would've been the same as plunging into the open sea! You will have to reach the central drill on foot...

traits.locale_text: “我发誓已经尽了全力。在其他任何地方降落都无异于一头扎进大海！您接下来只能步行前往中央钻机了……”

languages.text: "Ich schwöre, ich habe getan, was ich konnte. Hätte ich versucht, woanders zu landen, hätte ich genauso gut über dem Meer abstürzen können! Ihr müsst den zentralen Bohrer zu Fuß erreichen ...
languages.original_text: "I swear I did everything I could. Landing the thing anywhere else would've been the same as plunging into the open sea! You will have to reach the central drill on foot...

traits.locale_text: "Ich schwöre, ich habe getan, was ich konnte. Hätte ich versucht, woanders zu landen, hätte ich genauso gut über dem Meer abstürzen können! Ihr müsst den zentralen Bohrer zu Fuß erreichen ...

languages.text: "Yemin ederim elimden gelen her şeyi yaptım. Mekiği başka bir yere indirmek, açık denize dalmakla aynı şey olurdu! Merkezî matkaba yaya olarak ulaşmanız gerekecek..."
languages.original_text: "I swear I did everything I could. Landing the thing anywhere else would've been the same as plunging into the open sea! You will have to reach the central drill on foot...

traits.locale_text: "Yemin ederim elimden gelen her şeyi yaptım. Mekiği başka bir yere indirmek, açık denize dalmakla aynı şey olurdu! Merkezî matkaba yaya olarak ulaşmanız gerekecek..."

languages.text: « J'ai fait au mieux, je vous jure. Si j'avais tenté d'atterrir ailleurs, nous aurions fini au fond de l'océan ! Vous allez devoir rejoindre la foreuse centrale à pied… »
languages.original_text: "I swear I did everything I could. Landing the thing anywhere else would've been the same as plunging into the open sea! You will have to reach the central drill on foot...

traits.locale_text: « J'ai fait au mieux, je vous jure. Si j'avais tenté d'atterrir ailleurs, nous aurions fini au fond de l'océan ! Vous allez devoir rejoindre la foreuse centrale à pied… »
